title: Data for: Cannabinoid Ligand-Mediated Glycogen Depletion in Astrocytes Is Associated With Increased Intracellular Calcium, Energy Metabolism, and Membrane Dynamics
author: Fink, Katja
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains raw and processed data supporting the publication: 
 Cannabinoid Ligand-Mediated Glycogen Depletion in Astrocytes Is Associated With Increased Intracellular Calcium, Energy Metabolism, and Membrane Dynamics Journal of Neurochemistry. Related article DOI: 10.1111/jnc.70332 
 WHAT IS INCLUDED • Immunofluorescence: raw microscopy files (.czi) • Glycogen (PAS): raw microscopy image files (.czi) and PAS quantification spreadsheet (.xlsx) • Calcium: measurement spreadsheet (.xlsx) • Electrophysiology: measurement spreadsheets (.xlsx) • FRET: glucose and lactate measurement spreadsheets (.xlsx) • qPCR: result files (.xls/.xlsx) 
 FILE FORMATS • .czi (ZEISS CZI): open with ZEISS ZEN or Fiji/ImageJ using Bio-Formats importer • .xlsx/.xls: open with Microsoft Excel or compatible software 
 RELATIONSHIP TO THE ARTICLE This dataset is provided as supporting material for the associated publication (DOI: 10.1111/jnc.70332).
